items.name: Python-compiler-
items.description: A blazing-fast, ahead-of-time (AOT) Python compiler written completely from scratch.  Unlike other tools that simply package the Python interpreter (like PyInstaller) or transpile code to C (like Nuitka), this compiler parses pure Python code and directly generates native machine code (binary) for x86_64 and ARM64 architectures.
